channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Tariffs will make sneakers, jeans and almost everything Americans wear cost more, trade groups warn
item.description: Sending children back to school in new sneakers, jeans and T-shirts is likely to cost U.S. families significantly more this fall.
item.dc:creator: Anne D'Innocenzio, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Storms tore up two of America's most iconic trails. Federal cuts have disrupted repairs
item.description: CAMPO, Calif. (AP) — Hiking the Pacific Crest Trail is a challenge, especially for adventurers making the entire run from Southern California to Canada, and Eric Kipperman’s job is to greet them at the start and lay bare the difficulties ahead.
item.dc:creator: JULIE WATSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: US must return Maryland father mistakenly deported to El Salvador prison, judge rules
item.description: A federal judge on Friday ordered the Trump administration to arrange for the return of a Maryland man to the United States after he was mistakenly deported to a notorious El Salvador prison.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: CBP officers charged after allegedly taking bribes to wave in illegal immigrants
item.description: Two border officers face federal charges after allegedly accepting thousands in bribes to let illegal immigrants pass through the San Ysidro Port of Entry without inspection.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At least 16 dead in flooding and tornadoes as storms slash from Texas to Ohio
item.description: DYERSBURG, Tennessee. (AP) — Another round of torrential rain and flash flooding came Saturday for parts of the South and Midwest already heavily waterlogged by days of severe storms that also spawned deadly tornadoes. Forecasters warned that rivers in some places would continue to rise for days.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER and OBED LAMY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Majority of Americans uneasy over Trump's economic plan: WSJ poll
item.description: Fifty-four percent of voters are against the president’s levies on imported goods while 42 percent of survey respondents said they supported the measure.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5

item.title: Carmelo Anthony and Sue Bird highlight Basketball Hall of Fame class
item.description: Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are going into the Basketball Hall of Fame later this year, not once but twice. And LeBron James and Chris Paul are part of the group that’s headed to the Hall as well, even before their playing careers end.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Israeli troops deploy to a new security corridor across southern Gaza
item.description: TEL AVIV, Israel (AP) — Israeli troops deployed to a newly established security corridor across southern Gaza, the military announced Saturday, as pressure on the Hamas militant group increased weeks into the renewed war.
item.dc:creator: NATALIE MELZER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Man claims to be ICE agent, threatens to deport victims, deputies say
item.description: A Florida man is accused of pulling a vehicle over, claiming to be an ICE agent, and threatening to deport two victims.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, WGN 9

item.title: NY public schools tell Trump administration they won't comply with DEI order
item.description: New York state officials have told the Trump administration that they will not comply with its demands to end diversity, equity and inclusion practices in public schools, despite the administration's threats to terminate federal education funding.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: St. Louis family's prank leads to lobster's prolonged life
item.description: What started off as an April Fool’s prank turned into something more than what Brea Stenzel, her family and a lobster were expecting.
item.dc:creator: Daesha Gear, KRON4

item.title: Judge awards $6.6 million to whistleblowers who reported Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton to FBI
item.description: A district court judge has ruled in favor of four whistleblowers who said that Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton retaliated against them for reporting bribery allegations, awarding his employees more than $6 million combined in damages.
item.dc:creator: Nadia Lathan, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cleveland's José Ramírez hits 3 homers and claims another piece of Guardians history
item.description: José Ramírez hit three homers and carried the Guardians to a victory Friday night. The slugger claimed another place in Cleveland baseball history in the process.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump expected to host Netanyahu at White House next week
item.description: President Trump is expected to host Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu for a visit on Monday, a White House official told NewsNation.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KRON4

item.title: The Final Four again has multiple 5th-year starters. This time, it's a farewell to an uncommon era
item.description: “Credit to the NCAA for giving us a year back because that COVID year, that wasn’t real, honestly. Nah, it wasn’t fun at all.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Increasing sleepiness linked to dementia risk in women, study finds
item.description: The research by Neurology discovered women in their eighties who experience sleep disruption have an association with cognitive aging.
item.dc:creator: Diana Falzone, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida police arrest man for making 'written threats to kill' Trump
item.description: A Florida man was arrested on Friday after allegedly making posts on social media in which he threatened to kill President Donald Trump, according to police.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Justice Department seeks 7 year sentence for George Santos
item.description: Prosecutors said the length of the requested sentence — 87 months — reflects the serious nature of Santos’s “unparalleled” crimes.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Medicare won't cover anti-obesity GLP-1 drugs as Biden admin proposed
item.description: In November last year, the Biden administration proposed a new rule that would allow drugs like Wegovy and Zepbound to be covered by Medicare and Medicaid, expanding access for roughly 3.4 million Medicare users and about 4 million Medicaid enrollees.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Choi, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Republicans are debating a higher tax rate for millionaires: Report
item.description: Republicans are reportedly considering raising taxes on millionaires to help offset the cost of their tax bill.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Dow plunges 2,000 as sell-off for markets slams into a scarier gear following Trump's tariffs
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The sell-off for financial markets worldwide is slamming into a higher, scarier gear on Friday. The S&P 500 tumbled 5.7% as Wall Street's worst crisis since the COVID crash deepened after China matched President Donald Trump’s big raise in tariffs announced earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Microsoft's AI division head wants to create a lasting relationship between chatbots and their users
item.description: Fifty years after the founding of Microsoft, the CEO of its artificial intelligence division has a big task: develop a new product line as integral to daily life as the software giant's past innovations.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump calls for Marine Le Pen to be freed
item.description: President Trump defended embattled French far-right leader Marine Le Pen, arguing there's a “witch hunt” against her.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: FDA approves at-home chlamydia, gonorrhea, trichomoniasis test for women
item.description: Visby Medical Women’s Sexual Health Test can be taken by those with or without symptoms,and delivers results in about 30 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Popular hot sauce sold in California, 9 other states recalled
item.description: Two varieties of Texas Pete hot sauces have been recalled in 10 states over issues with bottling and labeling, the T.W. Garner Food Company has announced. The company issued a recall for certain bottles of its Texas Pete Habanero Buffalo Sauce and Texas Pete Sweet CHAbanero Sauce on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Reiner, KTLA 5

item.title: Texas Pete hot sauces recalled in 10 states
item.description: The T.W. Garner Food Company issued a recall for certain bottles of its Texas Pete Habanero Buffalo Sauce and Texas Pete Sweet CHAbanero Sauce on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Reiner, WGN 9

item.title: Texas Pete hot sauces recalled in 10 states
item.description: Two varieties of Texas Pete hot sauces have been recalled in 10 states over issues with bottling and labeling.
item.dc:creator: Michael Reiner, NewsNation

item.title: RealPage sues California city officials over rental algorithm ban
item.description: Real estate software company RealPage filed a federal lawsuit Wednesday against Berkeley, California — the latest city to try to block landlords from using algorithms when deciding rents. Officials in many cities claim the practice is anti-competitive and is driving up the price of housing.
item.dc:creator: R.J. RICO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Trump ordered to pay legal fees in ‘Steele Dossier’ lawsuit
item.description: A judge in the United Kingdom has ordered President Donald Trump to pay more than $820,000 in legal fees to the company representing former British spy Christopher Steele after he unsuccessfully sued over a dossier.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, ABC 4

item.title: Dow drops 1,600 as US stocks lead worldwide sell-off after Trump’s tariffs cause a COVID-like shock
item.description: Financial markets around the world are reeling Thursday following President Donald Trump’s latest and most severe set of tariffs, and the U.S. stock market is taking the worst of it so far.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Teen stabbed at track meet, dies in his twin brother's arms, father says
item.description: A 16-year-old is dead, and the suspect is in custody after an altercation between two students escalated to a stabbing at a track meet in Frisco, the Frisco Police Department said in a news release Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Erica Pauda, WFLA, NBC

item.title: A historic Black church took the Proud Boys to court. Now it controls their trademark
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — There is so much history between the walls of Metropolitan African Methodist Episcopal Church, which has hosted funerals for Rosa Parks and Frederick Douglass and opened its pews to American presidents and civil rights icons.
item.dc:creator: TIFFANY STANLEY, Associated Press, ABC 4
